title: Iran has no intention to hold talks with U.S; foreign minister says Trump proposal to end war being reviewed
summary_full: President Donald Trump has claimed the U.S. and Iran are "in negotiations now." But the Islamic Republic denies any direct talks to end the war.
summary_public: President Donald Trump has claimed the U.S. and Iran are "in negotiations now." But the Islamic Republic denies any direct talks to end the war.
